global.description: The ad features a vibrant blue background with key information and calls to action prominently displayed.
global.main_message: Encouraging users to track their finances with the CoinBridge app.

elements.label: Blue background
elements.description: A solid blue background fills the entire canvas, providing a vibrant backdrop for the other elements.

elements.label: Geometric shapes
elements.description: Various geometric shapes in lighter shades of blue are scattered across the top, adding visual interest.

elements.label: Main content area
elements.description: A large rectangular area in the center contains key information, framed by rounded edges.

elements.label: Descriptive text
elements.description: A medium-sized text block in white that reads 'Track every euro Built for peace of mind', centered within the main content area.

elements.label: App interface
elements.description: A rectangular area showcasing a simplified app interface, featuring rounded corners and a clean layout.

elements.label: CoinBridge logo
elements.description: A small logo positioned at the top left, featuring the text 'CoinBridge' in bold, dark font.

elements.label: Call to action button
elements.description: A rounded button at the bottom center with the text 'Try for free' in bold, inviting users to take action.

elements.label: Small decorative element
elements.description: A small circular shape in the center, adding a subtle decorative touch.

elements.label: Additional shape
elements.description: A rectangular shape positioned in the center, possibly representing additional content or decoration.

elements.label: Main headline
elements.description: A large, bold headline at the top reading 'CoinBridge', designed to grab attention.

elements.label: Supporting text
elements.description: A smaller text block below the headline, providing additional context about the app's purpose.
elements.text_content: Track every euro Built for peace of mind

elements.label: Secondary call to action
elements.description: A smaller call to action text at the bottom, encouraging users to try the app for free.
